page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8a.4xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs utilizing the x86_64 architecture, running on an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 7 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong single-core CPU capabilities, with stress-ng single-core testing placing the instance in the top 25% of its class. Multi-core performance, measured via stress-ng and PassMark CPU tests, falls within the average range. Memory performance is mixed; while small-block cached read operations demonstrate average speeds, large-block uncached read operations show weaker performance, placing in the bottom 25%. Cryptographic and vector processing capabilities are supported by hardware-level instruction sets, including AVX-512 and AES.

Given the 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and dedicated CPU allocation, this instance offers a cost-efficient profile for compute-intensive tasks that do not require massive memory footprints or local storage. The absence of bundled storage and public IPv4 addresses requires external provisioning for these resources. The server is suited for workloads such as static web serving, multi-threaded decompression tasks, database operations, and general compute-bound applications.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8a.4xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual server featuring 16 dedicated vCPUs and 16 physical cores on an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor running at 2.7 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and KVM hypervisor, it provides 32.0 GB of memory (2.0 GB per core) and a baseline network bandwidth of 7 Gbps, with no local storage or GPUs. Benchmark data shows strong single-core CPU performance, while multi-core operations and memory bandwidth generally align with mid-range averages. The instance is suited for compute-heavy workloads, static web serving, and database operations.

tagline: A dedicated AMD EPYC compute-optimized instance delivering strong single-core performance and balanced multi-threaded capabilities for compute-intensive workloads.

32.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB per core
